id.description: Id of created inquiry to reference later - 64 bit value.

id_str.description: Id of created inquiry as string

reference.description: Unique reference identifying this inquiry, as used in internal client's systems
Unique reference identifying transaction in your system

id.description: Unique id of created transaction - 64-bit value.

id_str.description: Unique id of created transaction as string

transactions.description: An array of objects containing identifiers of created transactions.

batch_inquiries.description: An array of objects containing identifiers of created inquiries and transactions.
